title: ornithopteris caudata
intro: Ornithopteris caudata, also known as the fern-like tree fern, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Matoniaceae. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, with its extracts showing antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities, which can help in reducing the risk of chronic diseases such as cancer and heart disease. The health benefits of Ornithopteris caudata include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
